description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bookcase constructed from dark wood with a subtle grain pattern. The front features three open shelves filled with a variety of books and objects, as well as a lower cabinet with two doors that have a contrasting reddish wood finish and metallic handles. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the sturdy, functional design. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage for books and decorative items. The overall appearance is modern and practical, suitable for urban interiors such as offices, libraries, or living rooms. The bookcase stands on a flat base, ensuring stability on flat surfaces.
description: A tall, dark wood bookcase with three open shelves filled with books and a lower cabinet with two contrasting wood doors. Modern and practical, it features a sturdy, rectangular design.
description_view_0: The left side of the bookcase, showing a solid, dark wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays three open shelves filled with books and objects, and a lower cabinet with two reddish wood doors and metallic handles.
description_view_2: The right side of the bookcase, similar to the left, is a solid, dark wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: The back of the bookcase, featuring a plain, dark wood panel with a small, subtle knob or mark.
